area_anchor: Brikette — Inbox code has hardcoded staff names, redundant type casts, and an unstable refresh timer
current_truth: Staff sender detection hardcodes personal names. Analytics route has a redundant type cast. ThreadDetailPane casts guestRoomNumbers without element validation. Auto-refresh interval is torn down on every state change. Failed quality checks aren't tracked for analytics. Message fetch has no upper bound guard.
next_scope_now: Move staff patterns to config, remove redundant casts, validate array elements, stabilize the refresh interval effect, track failed quality checks, and add message fetch bounds.
evidence_refs: operator-stated: hardcoded staff names; redundant type cast; unsafe array cast; stale closure; no quality check tracking; unbounded fetch
why: The inbox code contains several small quality issues: staff email detection breaks if personnel change, some type safety checks are missing which could display garbled data, the auto-refresh timer restarts unnecessarily often, and there's no tracking of which quality checks fail most. Cleaning these up makes the codebase more maintainable and reliable.

intended_outcome.statement: Staff patterns are configurable, type safety is enforced, refresh timer is stable, quality check failures are tracked, and message fetch is bounded.
